verse_text: and toward her placenta which came out from between her thighs and her child whom she might bear; for she will eat these secretly for lack of everything in the siege and desperate straits in which your enemy shall distress you in all your cities.

links.context: I provoked His mouth is a reference to breaking the laws God spoke to Moses and thus to His people. From 1:18-22, the "I" is the city of Jerusalem, and the warning for her disobedience was issued and recorded in [[DEU.28:15]]-68.
